programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Fantastic Four
programme.desc: Transported to an alternate universe, four young outsiders gain superhuman powers as they alter their physical form in shocking ways. Reed Richards becomes Mr. Fantastic, able to stretch and twist his body at will, while pal Ben Grimm gains immense strength as the Thing. Johnny Storm becomes the Human Torch, able to control and project fire, while his sister Sue becomes the Invisible Woman. Together, the team must harness their new abilities to prevent Doctor Doom from destroying the Earth.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. Doc Ock blames Spider-Man for the accident and seeks revenge. Meanwhile, Spidey's alter ego, Peter Parker, faces fading powers and self-doubt. Complicating matters are his best friend's hatred for Spider-Man and his true love's sudden engagement to another man.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lore is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the world's population. It's now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lore from destroying humanity.

programme.title: Bad Boys for Life
programme.desc: The wife and son of a Mexican drug lord embark on a vengeful quest to kill all those involved in his trial and imprisonment -- including Miami Detective Mike Lowrey. When Mike gets wounded, he teams up with partner Marcus Burnett and AMMO -- a special tactical squad -- to bring the culprits to justice. But the old-school cops must soon learn to get along with their new elite counterparts if they are to take down the vicious cartel that threatens their lives.

programme.title: Predator 2
programme.desc: Los Angeles is enduring a heat wave and a crime wave, so the pressure on police officer Michael Harrigan to solve a strange string of murders is mounting. Harrigan thinks the culprit can be found among the warring gangs and drug cartels, but FBI Special Agent Peter Keyes knows the horrible truth: Their killer is a fearsome extraterrestrial with keen hunting abilities that include superior night vision and the power to make itself invisible.

programme.title: The Predator
programme.desc: From the outer reaches of space to the small-town streets of suburbia, the hunt comes home. The universe's most lethal hunters are stronger, smarter and deadlier than ever before, having genetically upgraded themselves with DNA from other species. When a boy accidentally triggers their return to Earth, only a ragtag crew of ex-soldiers and a disgruntled science teacher can prevent the end of the human race.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: Behind our world, there is another -- a world of dangerous and powerful monsters that rule their domain with deadly ferocity. When Lt. Artemis and her loyal soldiers are transported from our world to the new one, the unflappable lieutenant receives the shock of her life. In a desperate battle for survival against enormous enemies with incredible powers and unstoppable, terrifying attacks, Artemis teams up with a mysterious hunter who has found a way to fight back.

programme.title: The Alligator People
programme.desc: Newly married nurse Joyce Webster (Beverly Garland) doesn't know what to think when her husband, Paul (Richard Crane), disappears during a train ride. She hires private investigators and eventually tracks him to an old bayou plantation, where the owner (Frieda Inescort) insists she's never heard of Paul. Joyce sticks around anyway and soon learns that local doctor Mark Sinclair (George Macready) has been using a life-altering alligator serum on the town's residents, and that Paul is among them.

programme.title: The Earth Dies Screaming
programme.desc: An astronaut (Willard Parker) returns from a test flight to find England overtaken by alien-controlled robots which turn corpses into zombies.

programme.title: The Detective
programme.desc: When a gay man is viciously slain, Detective Joe Leland (Frank Sinatra) is put on the case. Joe eventually tracks down the victim's roommate, who confesses to the crime and is sentenced to death; however, the outcome of the case doesn't sit well with the detective. Norma (Jacqueline Bisset), a distraught widow, visits Joe. She believes her husband's death was no accident, but the cops don't seem to care. Joe begins to investigate, and stumbles on a cover-up related to his previous case.

programme.title: The Quiller Memorandum
programme.desc: After two British Secret Intelligence Service agents are murdered at the hands of a cryptic neo-Nazi group known as Phoenix, the suave agent Quiller is sent to Berlin to investigate. There, he begins an affair with Inge Lindt, a beautiful young teacher. However, their lives are put in danger after Quiller is kidnapped and taken to Phoenix's headquarters, where he meets Oktober, the mysterious leader of the group.

programme.title: The Kremlin Letter
programme.desc: When an unauthorized letter is sent to Moscow alleging the U.S. government's willingness to help Russia attack China, former naval officer Charles Rone and his team are sent to retrieve it. They go undercover, successfully reaching out to Erika Kosnov, the wife of a former agent, now married to the head of Russia's secret police. Their plans are interrupted, however, when their Moscow hideout is raided by a cunning politician.

programme.title: The Terrorists
programme.desc: Attempting to secure the release of political prisoners, a terrorist group, led by the fierce Ray Petrie (Ian McShane), takes over a British plane. Tough Scandinavian operative Nils Tahlvik (Sean Connery) is sent in to deal with the armed men and free the aircraft's passengers. Unfortunately for Tahlvik, the terrorists prove to be quite formidable. Meanwhile, another unit of the same extremist organization is holding an English ambassador hostage, which further complicates matters.

programme.title: Hitman: Agent 47
programme.desc: Genetically engineered from conception to be the perfect killing machine, he's the culmination of decades of research, endowed with unprecedented strength, speed, stamina and intelligence. Known only as Agent 47 (Rupert Friend), his latest target is a corporation that plans to unlock the secret of his past to create an army of killers even more powerful than him. With help from a young woman, the elite assassin confronts revelations about his own origins in an epic battle with his deadliest foe.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: Behind our world, there is another -- a world of dangerous and powerful monsters that rule their domain with deadly ferocity. When Lt. Artemis and her loyal soldiers are transported from our world to the new one, the unflappable lieutenant receives the shock of her life. In a desperate battle for survival against enormous enemies with incredible powers and unstoppable, terrifying attacks, Artemis teams up with a mysterious hunter who has found a way to fight back.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Set several centuries in the future, the abandoned Alita is found in the scrapyard of Iron City by Ido, a compassionate cyber-doctor who takes the unconscious cyborg Alita to his clinic. When Alita awakens, she has no memory of who she is, nor does she have any recognition of the world she finds herself in. As Alita learns to navigate her new life and the treacherous streets of Iron City, Ido tries to shield her from her mysterious past.

programme.title: Real Steel
programme.desc: Charlie Kenton used to be a prizefighter but lost his chance to win a title when heavy, towering robots took over the boxing ring. Now working as a small-time promoter, Charlie pieces together scrap metal into low-end fighters, barely earning enough to make it from one underground venue to the next. After hitting rock bottom, Charlie reluctantly teams with his estranged son, Max, to build and train a championship robot for a last shot at redemption.

programme.title: Real Steel
programme.desc: Charlie Kenton used to be a prizefighter but lost his chance to win a title when heavy, towering robots took over the boxing ring. Now working as a small-time promoter, Charlie pieces together scrap metal into low-end fighters, barely earning enough to make it from one underground venue to the next. After hitting rock bottom, Charlie reluctantly teams with his estranged son, Max, to build and train a championship robot for a last shot at redemption.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Set several centuries in the future, the abandoned Alita is found in the scrapyard of Iron City by Ido, a compassionate cyber-doctor who takes the unconscious cyborg Alita to his clinic. When Alita awakens, she has no memory of who she is, nor does she have any recognition of the world she finds herself in. As Alita learns to navigate her new life and the treacherous streets of Iron City, Ido tries to shield her from her mysterious past.

programme.title: FXM Presents
programme.desc: An examination of the process of making movies follows a production from script to screen.

programme.title: Hitman: Agent 47
programme.desc: Genetically engineered from conception to be the perfect killing machine, he's the culmination of decades of research, endowed with unprecedented strength, speed, stamina and intelligence. Known only as Agent 47 (Rupert Friend), his latest target is a corporation that plans to unlock the secret of his past to create an army of killers even more powerful than him. With help from a young woman, the elite assassin confronts revelations about his own origins in an epic battle with his deadliest foe.

programme.title: The Horror of It All
programme.desc: Yankee salesman Jack (Pat Boone) wants to marry Cynthia Marley (Erica Rogers), and they travel to her family's English estate to break the good news. Cynthia warns that the family is a bit odd, which proves to be an understatement. One relative is an ex-thespian who still believes he's in a play, another behaves like a vampire and a third is imprisoned in the cellar due to his violent tendencies. But things get really sinister when the Marleys start succumbing to violent fates, one by one.

programme.title: Three Coins in the Fountain
programme.desc: Three hopeful American secretaries visiting Italy -- newcomer Maria (Maggie McNamara), romance-seeking Anita (Jean Peters) and the more mature Frances (Dorothy McGuire) -- fling their coins into Rome's Trevi Fountain, each making a wish. Soon, Maria is pursued by a dashing prince (Louis Jourdan), Anita finds herself involved with a forbidden coworker (Rossano Brazzi), and Frances receives a surprising proposal from her boss (Clifton Webb). All three women vow to one day return to Rome.

programme.title: The Lieutenant Wore Skirts
programme.desc: Successful scribe and decorated veteran Gregory Whitcomb (Tom Ewell) is ordered to reenlist in the U.S. military, so his spouse Katy (Sheree North), a former participant in the Women's Army Corps, resumes her old post to be closer to him. Unfortunately, Gregory's been sitting behind a desk since World War II ended, and he soon learns he's too out of shape to serve. Now, as Katy searches for a loophole that will free her from the Army, Gregory haplessly tries to take her place on the home front.

programme.title: Will Success Spoil Rock Hunter?
programme.desc: Rock Hunter (Tony Randall) writes television commercials, and he's hatched a strategy for a new beauty product. Needing a famous face to deliver his message, Rock tries to recruit actress Rita Marlowe (Jayne Mansfield). At first, she thinks it's beneath her, but she wants to make her actor lover (Mickey Hargitay) envious, so she agrees, as long as Rock pretends to be her boyfriend. Soon, Rock is running the ad company, but his ascension is greeted by all kinds of personal troubles.

programme.title: How to Steal a Million
programme.desc: Charles Bonnet (Hugh Griffith) expresses his passion for art by forging masterpieces -- and selling them at a hefty profit. The trouble starts when his reproduction of a prized sculpture winds up in a famous Paris museum. If experts determine that it is inauthentic, Bonnet's reputation will be tarnished. That's why his fetching daughter, Nicole (Audrey Hepburn), hires cat burglar Simon Dermott (Peter O'Toole) to steal the sculpture back before it's too late.

programme.title: Two for the Road
programme.desc: Architect Mark Wallace and his wife, Joanna, travel to France to meet with an affluent client. While there, they reflect on their first decade of marriage -- memories of when they first met, of courtship and of road trips through the French countryside. As flirtation and playful quarreling turn to boredom with the banality of married life, the Wallaces struggle to rekindle their passion, while mutual infidelity threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Father Stu
programme.desc: When an injury ends his amateur boxing career, Stuart Long moves to Los Angeles to find money and fame. While scraping by as a supermarket clerk, he meets Carmen, a Sunday school teacher who seems immune to his bad-boy charm. Determined to win her over, the longtime agnostic starts going to church to impress her. However, a motorcycle accident leaves him wondering if he can use his second chance to help others, leading to the surprising realization that he's meant to be a Catholic priest.

programme.title: We Bought a Zoo
programme.desc: Following his wife's untimely death, Los Angeles journalist Benjamin Mee decides to make a fresh start by quitting his job and moving his children to an 18-acre property containing the Rosemoor Wildlife Park. Though closed for years, Rosemoor is still home to many animals, cared for by Kelly Foster and her small staff. Mee opens his heart and his checkbook as he, Kelly and the others work to renovate and reopen the zoo.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. The sole survivor of the flight, Chuck washes ashore on a deserted island. When his efforts to sail away and contact help fail, Chuck learns how to survive on the island, where he remains for years, accompanied by only his handmade volleyball friend, Wilson. Will Chuck ever return to civilization and reunite with his loved ones?

programme.title: Father Stu
programme.desc: When an injury ends his amateur boxing career, Stuart Long moves to Los Angeles to find money and fame. While scraping by as a supermarket clerk, he meets Carmen, a Sunday school teacher who seems immune to his bad-boy charm. Determined to win her over, the longtime agnostic starts going to church to impress her. However, a motorcycle accident leaves him wondering if he can use his second chance to help others, leading to the surprising realization that he's meant to be a Catholic priest.

programme.title: Lucy in the Sky
programme.desc: After an awe-inspiring experience in outer space, an astronaut returns to Earth and starts to lose touch with reality in a world that now seems too small.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley
programme.desc: Roustabout Stanton Carlisle joins a traveling carny and unsuccessfully schemes to figure out the mind-reading act of Mademoiselle Zeena and her alcoholic husband, Pete. But when Pete dies, Zeena is forced to take on Stanton as a partner, and he quickly proves more gifted than his predecessor. Ambitious to a fault, Carlisle abandons Zeena and the carny to reinvent himself as The Great Stanton, wowing high-class audiences in a Chicago hotel.

programme.title: How to Steal a Million
programme.desc: Charles Bonnet (Hugh Griffith) expresses his passion for art by forging masterpieces -- and selling them at a hefty profit. The trouble starts when his reproduction of a prized sculpture winds up in a famous Paris museum. If experts determine that it is inauthentic, Bonnet's reputation will be tarnished. That's why his fetching daughter, Nicole (Audrey Hepburn), hires cat burglar Simon Dermott (Peter O'Toole) to steal the sculpture back before it's too late.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Stanley Moon (Dudley Moore) is a bumbling short-order cook, infatuated with Margaret (Eleanor Bron), the statuesque waitress he works with at Wimpy Burger in London. On the verge of suicide, he meets George Spiggott (Peter Cook), the devil, who, in return for his soul, grants him seven wishes to woo the challenging Margaret. Despite the wishes and the advice of the Seven Deadly Sins, including Lilian Lust (Raquel Welch), Stanley can't seem to win his love and shake the meddling Spiggott.

programme.title: Caprice
programme.desc: An industrial spy (Doris Day) for a cosmetics firm falls for another (Richard Harris) who may not be on her side.

programme.title: Fathom
programme.desc: While touring abroad in Europe, beautiful American skydiver Fathom Harvill (Raquel Welch) gets wrapped up in international intrigue when Scottish spy Douglas Campbell (Ronald Fraser) recruits her to help him on a secret mission. Before long, Fathom realizes that no one around her, including the mysterious Peter Merriweather (Tony Franciosa), can easily be trusted, leading to various adventures that involve bull fighting, beaches and, of course, romance.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Kaaapowie! Holy feature film, Batman ... one based on the tongue-in-cheek, campy 1960s television series. Watch Batman and Robin battle sharks, Catwoman, The Joker and The Riddler on the big screen. Can they try to prevent the bad guys from taking over the world? With a wham! and a pow! and a zip! ... our heroes just might win.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: Actor Rick Dalton gained fame and fortune by starring in a 1950s television Western, but is now struggling to find meaningful work in a Hollywood that he doesn't recognize anymore. He spends most of his time drinking and palling around with Cliff Booth, his easygoing best friend and longtime stunt double. Rick also happens to live next door to Roman Polanski and Sharon Tate -- the filmmaker and budding actress whose futures will forever be altered by members of the Manson Family.

programme.title: The King's Man
programme.desc: One man must race against time to stop history's worst tyrants and criminal masterminds from starting a war and wiping out millions of people.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you PAUL BLART: MALL COP, five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: The Producers
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck producer and his accountant hit on a get-rich-quick scheme that backfires when their sure-fire flop becomes a hit.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: At a crossroads in her life, Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) travels to Italy, India and Bali to discover meaning and happiness in this inspiring true story, based on the best-selling book.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: From the director of Step Brothers and Talladega Nights comes this utterly hilarious action-comedy starring comedy favorites Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg as two New York City desk cops who take a chance to step up their game and solve a huge crime.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer is reluctantly embroiled in a series of outrageous tests by her chauvinistic correspondent, host of a TV segment titled "The Ugly Truth," to prove his theories on relationships and help her find love. His clever ploys, however, lead to an unexpected result.

programme.title: Two If By Sea
programme.desc: Petty thief Frank O'Brien steals a $4 million masterpiece painting. His cashier girlfriend of seven years, Roz, befriends the potential buyer of the painting, Evan Marsh, on an island. After being captured by FBI Agent O'Malley at the fish factory, she discovers Marsh is actually an art thief.

programme.title: Two Can Play That Game
programme.desc: Shante, a successful marketing executive is always the one her friends go to when they are having male trouble. Shante has the perfect relationship with her lawyer boyfriend Keith.......that is, until she spots him at a restaurant dancing with a young woman.

programme.title: The Man From Toronto
programme.desc: The world's deadliest assassin and New York's biggest screw-up are mistaken for each other.

programme.title: About Last Night (2014)
programme.desc: Kevin Hart, Michael Ealy, Regina Hall and Joy Bryant star in this hilarious romantic comedy about what men and women really want. Bernie (Hart) and Joan (Hall) are two fiery flirters who are passionate about everything from hookups to breakups. When he sets up his best friend, Danny (Ealy), with her roommate, Debbie (Bryant), the sparks soon fly as they try to navigate the relationship minefields from the bar to the bedroom.

programme.title: 13 Going On 30
programme.desc: A 13-year girl who dreams of being popular locks herself in a closet after a humiliating experience. When she finally emerges, she finds herself just shy of her 30th birthday, looking fabulous and extremely popular.

programme.title: Two Can Play That Game
programme.desc: Shante, a successful marketing executive is always the one her friends go to when they are having male trouble. Shante has the perfect relationship with her lawyer boyfriend Keith.......that is, until she spots him at a restaurant dancing with a young woman.

programme.title: The Man From Toronto
programme.desc: The world's deadliest assassin and New York's biggest screw-up are mistaken for each other.

programme.title: About Last Night (2014)
programme.desc: Kevin Hart, Michael Ealy, Regina Hall and Joy Bryant star in this hilarious romantic comedy about what men and women really want. Bernie (Hart) and Joan (Hall) are two fiery flirters who are passionate about everything from hookups to breakups. When he sets up his best friend, Danny (Ealy), with her roommate, Debbie (Bryant), the sparks soon fly as they try to navigate the relationship minefields from the bar to the bedroom.

programme.title: 13 Going On 30
programme.desc: A 13-year girl who dreams of being popular locks herself in a closet after a humiliating experience. When she finally emerges, she finds herself just shy of her 30th birthday, looking fabulous and extremely popular.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: A Hawaiian island playboy has to use his imagination to win over the girl of his dreams when he discovers she has no short-term memory. Every night he is erased from her memory so he has to make her fall in love with him all over again the next day...and the next...and the next!

programme.title: Did You Hear About The Morgans?
programme.desc: The comedy Did You Hear About the Morgans? follows a highly successful Manhattan couple, Meryl and Paul Morgan (Sarah Jessica Parker and Hugh Grant), whose almost-perfect lives have only one notable failure: their dissolving marriage. But the turmoil of their romantic lives is nothing compared to what they are about to experience: they witness a murder and become targets of a contract killer.

programme.title: Two If By Sea
programme.desc: Petty thief Frank O'Brien steals a $4 million masterpiece painting. His cashier girlfriend of seven years, Roz, befriends the potential buyer of the painting, Evan Marsh, on an island. After being captured by FBI Agent O'Malley at the fish factory, she discovers Marsh is actually an art thief.

programme.title: It Could Happen To You
programme.desc: Much to the horror of his upwardly mobile wife, a New York City cop makes good on his promise to split his lottery winnings with a waitress in this delightful comedy. Money changes everything, and all three lives are transformed in this charming comedy.

programme.title: The Three Stooges (B&W Shorts)
programme.desc: The Stooges get jobs as census takers and wind up in a fancy mansion looking for people to survey. Moe and Larry are recruited to join a bridge game, while Curly adds Alum to the lemonade. The resulting concoction is consumed by everyone, resulting in puckered lips and shrunken clothes. The boys next try to take the census at a football stadium. They disguise themselves as players and wind up in the middle of the game. Curly runs off with the ball and all the other players in pursuit.

programme.title: The Three Stooges (B&W Shorts)
programme.desc: The Stooges are singing waiters who are enlisted by a doctor to try and cheer up a little girl. It seems that the girl's father is a banker who was kidnapped with $300,000 worth of bonds. Failing to cheer up the girl, the Stooges go out looking for the father and by a series of coincidences wind up in the bad guys hideout. The villains return and after a wild fight the boys free the missing man.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Funnyman Adam Sandler stars in MR. DEEDS, the hilarious remake of the classic American comedy Mr. Deeds Goes to Town.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Funnyman Adam Sandler stars in MR. DEEDS, the hilarious remake of the classic American comedy Mr. Deeds Goes to Town.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Two disgraced FBI agents go way undercover in an effort to protect hotel heiresses the Wilton Sisters from a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Gigli
programme.desc: When small time street thug Larry Gigli meets a tough and gorgeous enforcer named Ricki, the sparks fly in this outrageous battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: Out Of Sync, Out Of Mind
programme.desc: Aunt Clara tries a spell and throws Samantha's voice out of sync.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: That Was No Chick, That Was My Wife
programme.desc: Samantha's simultaneous appearance in Chicago and New York almost costs Darrin his fob.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: Allergic To Ancient Macedonian Dodo Birds
programme.desc: Endora's magic is mysteriously transferred to Aunt Clara.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Aunt Clare zips the Stephens family and Gladys Kravitz to witch-hunting Plymouth on Thanksgiving Day.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darren must accept Endora's help to woo a valuable new client.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: My What Big Ears You Have
programme.desc: When Darrin tries to buy Samantha a surprise gift, Endora accuses him of seeing another woman.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: I Get Your Nannie...You Get My Goat
programme.desc: Annoyed that Darrin has stolen his servant, Lord Montdrako puts a spell on him.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: Humbug Not To Be Spoken Here
programme.desc: Samantha reforms a skinflint on Christmas Eve

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Aunt Clara summons the greatest of them all -- Leonard Da Vinci -- to paint the Stephens' house.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora drinks a love potion intended for Samantha.
Mary and Sandra vie for a chance to deliver a line in a movie being shot at their building.
Sandra's show-biz career as a talk-show host threatens the friendship of the whole group when she questions them on the air about sex in the eighties.
Rose receives an offer to buy her building from a real estate magnate whose plan to renovate means tearing down 227.
In charge of the big choir competition, Mary must make room in her have for the visiting choir's deacon, who is notoriously arrogant, thoughtless and pushy.
Alarmed by Brenda and her friends' casual attitude about teen pregnancy, Mary uses some unusual methods to teach them a lesson about parenting that they'll never forget.
Mary is delighted to learn that Lester will be named "Man of the Year" by the local Men's Club...and distraught upon discovering she's not allowed to attend the special ceremony.
To protest the opening of a sleazy club in her neighborhood, Mary dreams of running the varmints out of town.
In an effort to help Lester build his business, Mary takes some questionable steps to land him a big construction contract.
Mary and Lester are shocked when his cousin Ed's enviable "picture-perfect" marriage suddenly falls apart.

When Mary and Sandra go to court to settle a dispute over song royalties, Sandra's ammunition is veteran "barrister" John Houseman, while Mary's ace in the hole is a "Supreme" expert witness, singer Mary Wilson.
Mayhem and murder plague 227 when a mysterious man with a knife rents an apartment in Mary's building.

When Mary and Lester go to the reading of his uncle's will, they are both surprised to learn they have distant cousins whom they've never met, and even more confused when they discover they are a different color.
When Lester's old high school sweetheart comes to the neighborhood in search of a new home, Mary fears that she'll try to move in on more than just her turf.
Suffering from a very cold winter spell, the residents of "227" invade Mary and Lester's apartment, which is one of two apartments with heat.
When Mary and Lester's school teacher friend Mitchell meets Sandra, he sets out to win her pampered heart, no matter how many gifts or expensive dates it takes.
After a whirlwind courtship, Sandra accepts Mitchell's wedding proposal, making a commitment to trade in her glamorous life for what she not-so-long-ago considered a boring existence.

programme.title: The Fog
programme.desc: One hundred years after their ship was deliberately wrecked, the ghosts of the murdered seaman have returned to Antonio Bay to exact a ghastly vengeance.

programme.title: Edge Of Winter
programme.desc: Elliot Baker seizes the chance to develop a better relationship with his sons when his ex-wife, Karen, and her new husband take a vacation and leave the boys with him. What starts as a bonding opportunity turns into a nightmarish adventure when they get stranded in a deserted cabin near the lake as night falls and a snowstorm rages.

programme.title: Anacondas: Trail Of Blood
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe, the deadliest reptiles are back.

programme.title: Sheena (1984)
programme.desc: Exotic Tanya Roberts stars as Sheena, a comic book legend that comes to life. As a child, she was lost in the African jungle and adopted by the Zambouli tribe. She rules over the untamed wilds of Africa, until outsiders challenge her domain in this exotic action-adventure.

programme.title: Life (2017)
programme.desc: A space crew's mission turns to one of primal fear after discovering a terrifying life form.

Never before has a date in history been so significant to so many cultures, so many religions, scientists, and governments. 2012 is an epic adventure about a global cataclysm that brings an end to the world and tells of the heroic struggle of the survivors.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Godzilla (1998)
programme.desc: The enormous monster descends upon New York, and it's up to the Army and an odd team of investigators to unravel the mystery behind the incredible creature before it's too late.

programme.title: The Mask of Zorro
programme.desc: A sweeping tale of love and honor, tragedy and triumph set against the Spanish conquest of Mexico, THE MASK OF ZORRO stars Anthony Hopkins and Antonio Banderas. programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: Alpha (2018)
programme.desc: Alpha is an epic adventure set in the last Ice Age. While on his first hunt with his tribe's most elite group, a young man is injured and left for dead. Awakening to find himself broken and alone, he must learn to survive and navigate the harsh and unforgiving wilderness.

programme.desc: Miles Logan (Martin Lawrence) is a talented jewel thief who has stolen $20 million dollars worth of diamonds and has hidden them at a construction site before being captured. Now, after three years in jail, he returns to pick up the diamonds only to find that the site is now a police precinct.

programme.title: Call Me by Your Name

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: At the U.S. Open, the first major tournament of the year in Indianapolis, Kyle Troup, AKA "The Pro with the 'Fro," sets out to repeat as bowling's "Green Jacket" winner.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: A disappointing group-stage exit at the 2024 Copa América triggers Berhalter's firing and raises questions about the state of the USMNT.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: APD cold case detective Dan Jackson reveals the behind-the-scenes details of the painstaking work that he and other investigators used in tracking down the killer of four teenage girls in Austin, Texas in 1991.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Niall and Ava face major life changes as Ruben struggles with his relationship; An impulsive choice between Mona and Niall has serious consequences for all involved.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Barbie
programme.desc: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

programme.title: Josh Johnson: Symphony
programme.desc: Debuting original material about the shared experiences as humans, tackling topics like family, religion and relationships through his unique point of view and signature creativity; expecting an original and unforgettable experience, filmed at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander, also known as the AANHPI, communities in America.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Saltburn
programme.desc: A student is invited to an eccentric classmate's estate for an exciting summer.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Niall and Ava face major life changes as Ruben struggles with his relationship; An impulsive choice between Mona and Niall has serious consequences for all involved.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
programme.desc: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: Table 19
programme.desc: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: My Cousin Rachel
programme.desc: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: In 1991, the murder of four teenage girls rocks the city of Austin; a lack of hard evidence soon thwarts the investigation.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: After years of false leads and wrongful arrests, new investigators take over the case and revisit a key interrogation video.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: As the investigation increasingly focuses on the young suspects, police subject them to further videotaped interrogations, which reveal contradictory and unstable versions of what happened and some confessions.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: When new DNA evidence leads to Springsteen and Scott's release, the victims' families must grapple with the unknown.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: APD cold case detective Dan Jackson reveals the behind-the-scenes details of the painstaking work that he and other investigators used in tracking down the killer of four teenage girls in Austin, Texas in 1991.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
programme.desc: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: Logan
programme.desc: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: After David Sconce takes over his family's mortuary business, a local funeral director makes allegations about the crematorium.

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: David expands the business as allegations of abuse mount; following his arrest, evidence is discovered in the death of a rival.

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: Members of the Lamb family are convicted of various crimes, including fraud; while in prison, a murder charge is brought against David for the death of his competitor.

programme.title: Men
programme.desc: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

programme.title: The Florida Project
programme.desc: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

programme.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
programme.desc: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Victor Frankenstein is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe, with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Wilson
programme.desc: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
programme.desc: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

programme.title: Spring Awakening: Those You've Known
programme.desc: The original cast and creative team of "Spring Awakening" reunite 15 years after the Tony-winning Broadway run for a concert to benefit The Actors Fund; participants include cast members Jonathan Groff, Lea Michele and Skylar Astin.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

programme.title: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

programme.title: The Divergent Series: Insurgent
programme.desc: Tris must confront her inner demons and fight against an alliance which threatens to tear her society apart.

programme.title: The Divergent Series: Allegiant
programme.desc: ALLEGIANT takes Tris and Four into a new world, far more dangerous than ever before.

programme.desc: Two star-crossed lovers fight to stay together against schemers, killers, and their own families.

This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. Peter and Lois decide to go on a second honeymoon to spice up their marriage, while Brian is left at home to take care of the kids. programme.title: Family Guy

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The funfair and daredevil riders of the wall of death make their annual visit to Midsomer village Whitcombe Mallet. When the owner of an equestrian centre is trampled by his horse, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson have to unravel a complex feud from the past where nothing is what it seems.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy attempts to cook a romantic dinner for Meg with Mrs C's help, but she doesn't show any signs of leaving once Meg turns up - when the two of them get a moment alone, they make a pact that should this evening be a disaster, they'll agree to part ways amicably. Mrs C once again interrupts - the Reverend Lane, the vicar who tried to replace Alphy, is outside and seeking sanctuary with a woman he claims is his niece. Soon enough, more strangers arrive with Geordie in hot pursuit - there's been a murder at a strip club and these are all the suspects. When Leonard arrives lonely without Daniel, it's not long before all hope of a romantic evening has gone out the window - with everyone assembled, the group attempts to reconstruct the mysterious circumstances leading to the death of the club's owner 'Madam'. Crammed into the vicarage, they try to make sense of a missing murder weapon, varying accounts of the victim's character, and a reverend who tries to flee the scene.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy agrees to help his old friend Reverend Potts, who runs a foundling home for children - with the news that the house will close, a series of 'otherworldly' goings-on have caused disruption amongst the kids. Potts hopes that Alphy can connect with them and reinstate some faith and stability - what he finds is the home in a sorry state housing a sickly teenager, a seemingly sinister nurse, and evidence of witchcraft. That night, a teenager is found dead at the bottom of the stairs - when it's clear the local police won't give these 'broken' children a proper investigation, Alphy calls Geordie. As Geordie starts to suspect Potts, however, Alphy derails the investigation by defending him a little too hard - elsewhere, Leonard turns more and more to drink back home and has harsh words for Mrs C that are hard to take back, and Cathy has her own struggles at work and quits her job when her manager refuses to take her seriously.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Another case in Sally Wainwright's acclaimed drama series which focuses on the professional and personal lives of two Manchester detectives. DCI Gill Murray and DC Rachel Bailey go to Bristol to advise on a rape and murder case which bears striking similarities to an infamous case from 13 years ago. At the time of the original case, Gill helped catch the perpetrator Jeremy Leach, who was convicted for the rape and murder of four women but is now claiming that he is innocent. Another woman has been raped and killed using Leach's exact MO; could the real murderer still be out there? At home, Rachel discovers that her brother Dom is prostituting himself in her flat. She is furious and also heartbroken to realise that this is how Dom got by in prison. Later, Rachel learns that the CPS will not be charging her ex-boyfriend Nick Savage with her attempted murder. Both she and Gill are appalled, and Rachel wonders how on earth she could have once been in love with such a man.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Detective drama series. The team investigates when the body of an eight-year-old boy is discovered, but as they search for the paedophile killer, they are unaware that the culprit has placed himself at the heart of the child's grieving family. Meanwhile, Dom's HIV test is negative, but he does something stupid in his relief which jeopardises Rachel's sergeant's exam. At the same time, Sean thinks that he and Rachel are destined to be together - although she is not convinced - and when Janet is persuaded to give things a go with Andy, she finds herself having doubts.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Betrayal, infidelity and blackmail fester as plans to re-enact a Victorian prizefight turn nasty - and even DCI Barnaby finds his judgement clouded by an old friend. Midsomer Morchard prepares to welcome back local boxer John Kinsella from his world title fight victory in New York - Kinsella is returning with his ruthless and controlling promoter Frank Bishop to take part in a re-enactment of a match from 1860. When Bishop arrives, he goes to see solicitor Giles Braithwaite but instead finds the lawyer dead - meanwhile, trainer Teddy Molloy is working with another fighter called Ken Tuohy, who suspects Kinsella of a dalliance with his fiancee. There are plenty of other grudges and secrets simmering in the village, with revelations of discord, adultery, gambling and Giles's assistant Iris being accused of blackmail. When it comes time for the re-enactment, Tuohy takes the place of Kinsella's opponent and attacks Kinsella - Bishop is then found dead. Can Barnaby find the killer?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Leonard has landed himself in trouble - drunk and causing disruption in the local boozer, Larry is called in and arrests him. Leonard's spirits aren't dampened, though, and it's only when police sergeant Floyd brings up his previous stint in prison and calls him 'son' that Leonard sees red and lashes out. Eventually falling unconscious, he wakes up to find the sergeant dead in his cell with no memory of what happened - adding to the distress is the fact that the prisoner in the cell next door is having an asthma attack and screaming for his father. While Alphy is more confident of Leonard's innocence, Geordie is less afraid to stare at the truth however hard to swallow - what ensues is a locked-door mystery that could clear their friend's name or seal his fate forever. It's not looking good - there are few logical conclusions, Alphy and Geordie are slowly having to rule out other possibilities and, to cap it all, Leonard doesn't seem to want help.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy remains undecided on his birthday about whether to open a letter his mother wrote when she left him as a baby or not - he plans to spend the evening alone, but Geordie has organised a surprise treat in the form of a gig. Local up-and-comers The Velvet Jacks are playing - not only has Geordie brought their group of friends, but he's also invited Meg. Geordie thinks it's the push Alphy needs and, with everyone watching, Alphy is pressured into asking her out again - the evening is overshadowed, however, when the band's frontman is found dead with another band member standing over him. Geordie and Alphy are called on and soon uncover in-fighting between the band and their manager, alongside a love triangle with a female fan - elsewhere, Leonard attempts to stay completely off drink, Mrs C and Cathy go ahead with their plan to hoodwink the bank into giving them a loan, and Larry and Miss Scott use the case as a distraction to complete a very important matter.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Detective drama series. Rachel is angry and upset about missing her sergeant's exam and about Nick Savage not being charged with her attempted murder. Sean tells her that he has booked the registry office, and even though she still says no, his relentless cheerfulness makes her smile. Andy insists that he is prepared to give Janet all the time and space she needs, but she then gets home to find him already there and ingratiating himself with her mother and Elise. Meanwhile, Janet learns much more than she bargained for in an interview with Geoff Hastings and Rachel and the rest of the team investigate the brutal and racially-motivated murder of a 21-year-old taxi driver.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Sally Wainwright's acclaimed drama series following the personal and professional lives of Manchester detectives DC Rachel Bailey and DS Janet Scott. The team investigates when a woman with a green face and head and dressed in a sexy policewoman's outfit is found dead in a field. DCI Gill Murray comes to the conclusion that the killer must have been the woman's lover; however, the late Susie Binns had many partners, and finding the guilty party may be tricky. The team must also work out why the body had a green face... Meanwhile, Sean has a surprise for Rachel - he wants her to meet his eight-year-old son Haydn, who is a real chip off the old block. Rachel can think of nothing worse; she struggles with this new information and what it could mean for their relationship. Also, as Andy accuses Janet of having him on, tension rises between them. Janet never intended to cause problems with Andy, but now Gill is worried that the atmosphere between the former couple might affect the team.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A planning dispute turns to murder after a leading light in the Midsomer Conservation Society suspects her neighbours are involved in a money-making development scam. Political wrangling, burglaries and sexual liaisons abound in picturesque Great Pelfe, but why is someone driven to start killing? As Maureen is attacked with a broken bottle in the grounds and bleeds to death, planning officer Liz Gerrard beds Rogers and police discover that the victims of a spate of burglaries and vandalism all support a controversial development at Pelfe Chase. Barnaby then finds a catapult at Maureen's house - was she the vandal? As Election Day approaches, Jones suspects that Fiona has given Norman Swascombe free land as a bung, but the truth surprises him - meanwhile, a night of passion for Liz and Otley turns deadly... As Dr Bullard discovers that Rogers was killed using Otley's veterinary drugs, Barnaby realises that the murderer will not stop until everyone who knows the truth is silenced.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Shane discovers Danielle's stash of drugs when he searches Zak and Eli's van. Ross struggles with his feelings for Donna, and Lily tells Pearl about Peter's financial troubles.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eli gets word that Danielle has been taken to London following her arrest and decides to track her down. Donna is jealous after finding out Ross spent the night with Chas.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve lets himself into the pub to find Michelle enjoying breakfast with her friend JD. Tina exacts revenge on David at the salon and Teresa's poisoning begins to take effect.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tina continues to make a scene in front of the shop's clients, much to the horror of David's bosses. Becky offers Michelle advice about Steve, and Molly loses her engagement ring.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A death in custody puts Mike's career on the line, and Greengrass and Bernie move into the taxi business and discover a novel way to supplement their income.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. An old flame of Mike's turns up in Aidensfield as Greengrass loses his heart to an aristocratic lady poacher.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Crime drama. A brutal robbery at a secluded Brighton house pulls Grace and Branson into a challenging enquiry when thousands of pounds worth of beautiful antiques are stolen and the owner is left fighting for her life - the prime target, however, appears to have been an item of great sentimental value to the homeowner and her brother who is a renowned antiques dealer. This particular item has deep emotional ties to a fascinating mystery involving their father which spans back to 1960s East London and a painful night on which their life as they knew it changed forever - as Grace digs deeper into this mysterious crime, he unearths a web of ancient grudges which leads him down a murderous trail through the world of Brighton antiques in a race against time to discover who is at the heart of this robbery, recover what was taken, and bring to light answers which have been buried for many years.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Cathy and Mrs C embark on their new business venture, a fashion boutique, as the gang muck in to help with a promotional photoshoot - Cathy has even roped in one of the local girls from Swinnerton's to model, but they may have underestimated the size of the task given a leery photographer, a designer with her own agenda and haughty models. When the dead body of their photographer turns up onsite, it throws the business into disarray - their shop is a crime scene and everyone is a suspect. The victim is soon connected to the theft of a local diamond from a previous shoot - with his wallet gone, it's possible someone knew about the diamond. Elsewhere, Geordie tries to track down Alphy's mother despite Alphy not wanting to meet her - Geordie figures it can't hurt to try without Alphy knowing, but when Cathy raises a glass to Geordie finding Alphy's mum after the fashion show, this is the first that Alphy has heard of it and he is forced to react in front of everyone.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy and Geordie realise that they miss each other and stop sulking as Geordie invites Alphy to meet Fascist Wilbur Church, who has been invited to speak at the student union - there have been attempts on Wilbur's life wherever he goes, but it's Wilbur's wife who opens a parcel bomb addressed to him when one gets through. Are these attempts on his life politically motivated, or more connected to his own family? The race is on to solve the case before the killer strikes again...

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Sean surprises Rachel when he tells her that he has been in contact with her estranged mother, who would love to see her. Unable to accept that Janet has ended their affair, Andy punishes her by keeping her out of the heart of the investigation, leading to a painful row. Meanwhile, the team looks into the murder of Leon Foster; Leon's death looks like a typical gang killing at first, but the discovery that he was sexually mutilated raises suspicions that this could be a domestic murder.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: A hungover Rachel learns that Nick Savage has been brutally assaulted and that she is top of the list of suspects. Scared and unable to remember what happened, she struggles to convince herself that she did not do it. Meanwhile, thinking that she has made her peace with Andy, Janet is shocked to discover that he has given her misinformation which causes Gill to miss an appointment with the coroner. Unable to find out who is messing her around, Gill tells Janet and Andy that one of them will have to leave the syndicate. At the same time, Gill is forced to re-open an accidental death case when she learns that the dead man's wife often talked about killing him.

programme.title: Robson and Jim's Fly Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Actors and best friends Robson Green and Jim Murray continue their search for big fish on another incredible fly-fishing adventure. In this episode, Robson and Jim head to the River Towy in Wales to fish for sea trout before heading to Jim's childhood holiday destination - Abersoch - to fish for bass.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur's new dispatch business is a runaway success, but Ray thinks it's all too good to be true and not that kosher either.

programme.title: Smokey and the Bandit 2
programme.desc: Comedy crime caper sequel. It's been a few years since Cletus and the Bandit made their famous 28-hour run to Texas for a few cases of Coors, and the Bandit is now a washed-up has-been living in the past... that is, until Big Enos and Little Enos make him another offer. The pair want the Bandit to transport a live elephant across the United States to Texas in three days or less, but it's a mammoth task that proves far from easy when old enemy Sheriff Buford T Justice enters hot pursuit of them!

programme.title: English Football League...
programme.desc: ...Play-Off Highlights. Action from the League Two Play-Off final between Salford City and Notts County at Wembley Stadium. Life in League One awaits the victors. [S]

programme.title: Under Siege 2: Dark Territory
programme.desc: Action thriller sequel. SEAL Team Commander Casey Ryback has retired from the Navy and is now a chef at the Mile High Cafe in Denver, Colorado - Ryback is taking his niece Sarah on holiday to reconnect and commiserate with her after the death of her parents, but when they board a train travelling westbound through the Rocky Mountains from Denver to Los Angeles, they have no idea that a group of mercenaries led by a gun-for-hire and a mentally unstable ex-CIA agent are about to hijack it...

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: The French woman stuns the survivors when she shows up with a dire warning about 'The Others'', while Michael and Jin ready the raft for sailing.

programme.title: Motorsport UK

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Magnum guards a wealthy socialite's quarantined dog from its former owner, a gangster who is determined to retrieve it by any means necessary.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Magnum investigates a woman's claims that her long-lost fiance - who was reported missing in action - may still be alive, only to discover that the man in question was actually a secret agent working for the US government.

programme.title: The Saint

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ray Winstone makes a guest appearance in this episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. When Debbie's wayward younger sister goes missing, Ken and Harry's search for her involves them both in blue movies and a brush with the law.

programme.title: The Sweeney
