programme.title: Tagarupalya
programme.desc: Revolve around the essence of rural life and how the villagers cook food on the temple premises and serve it to the devotees.

programme.title: Baahubali 2-The Conclusion
programme.desc: Kattappa tells Shivudu about Amarendra Baahubali's lineage. Shivudu, now Mahendra Baahubali, allies with Kattappa to dethrone Bhallaladeva for past wrongs.

programme.title: Pelli SandaD
programme.desc: Srikanth falls in love with Swapna not knowing that she is the sister of the girl he is actually supposed to marry. When Swapna finds out, she backs out for the sake of her sister's happiness.

programme.title: Main Hoon Lucky The Racer
programme.desc: Two brothers, who are poles apart in nature, become enemies of a gangster who aspires to become a politician. The latter succeeds in his plans, but the brothers decide to end his reign at all costs.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: An undefeated army led by a scorpion king is erased from history. A high priest wants to resurrect them but needs a special bracelet to do so.

programme.title: Hello Mummy
programme.desc: Boney loves Stefy and wants to marry her. However, Stefy's mother's ghost disapproves of Boney and haunts her. Boney must overcome this ghostly obstacle to win Stefy's hand.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: During the party, the men of Gokuldham drink an alcoholic beverage from France. S01 E2090.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham men gather at Popatlal's, who gets a call asking him to watch the news. S01 E2091.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When the men realize the alcohol they drank is poisonous, they start to panic. S01 E2092.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal asks for the perfume from France, which makes Jethalal nervous. S01 E2093.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha informs Jethalal that a major hotel chain wants to order televisions from them in bulk. S01 E2094.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is surprised to see Babita at the balcony after a long time. When she asks him about a coconut-based sweet, he immediately offers to get it for her. S01 E2274.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Hansraj Hathi receives an invite to attend a special programme for doctors. Excited, he asks Komal to shop. S01 E2275.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Komal is dejected when she is unable to find a suitable dress due to her weight. S01 E2276.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Komal meets a dietitian, who misguides her and asks her not to reveal her new diet to anyone. She also teaches a new way to stay healthy, by laughing out loud for no reason, to Komal. S01 E2277.

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of her twin sister, a young American encounters the tormented spirits of Japan's mysterious and legendary Aokigahara Forest.","large":"When her twin sister disappears in Japan, a young American named Sara becomes determined to find out what happened to her. Sara's investigation leads her to the legendary Aokigahara Forest, located at the base of Mount Fuji. Accompanied by expatriate Aiden, she enters the mysterious wilderness after being warned to "stay on the path." Her investigation plunges her into a dark world where the angry and tormented souls of the dead prey on those who dare to explore the forest.

programme.title: Games
programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Simone Signoret) in black moves in with married Manhattan thrill-seekers (James Caan, Katharine Ross) and helps one trick the other.","large":"Wealthy and bored, Paul (James Caan) and Jennifer Montgomery (Katharine Ross) while away their hours in a New York City apartment filled with pinball machines and other amusements. The couple's routine is upended when door-to-door saleswoman Lisa Schindler (Simone Signoret) drops by and is suddenly taken ill. The Montgomerys let her spend the night. And soon, the sophisticated Lisa and her hosts embark on a new set of very adult -- and very dangerous -- games.

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A televangelist (Gregory Itzin) influences a confrontational man (Billy Burke) motivated by revenge.

programme.title: The Green Inferno
programme.desc: Student activists (Lorenza Izzo, Ariel Levy) crash-land in the Amazon and encounter an indigenous tribe of cannibals who'd like to have them for dinner.","large":"New York college student Justine (Lorenza Izzo), a lawyer's daughter, meets a student activist named Alejandro (Ariel Levy) when he goes on a hunger strike on behalf of underpaid janitors. Smitten, Justine agrees to help Alejandro undertake his next project: to save the Amazon. She soon learns to regret her decision when their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle and she and the rest of their group are taken captive by a tribe of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Yuppies (Dwier Brown, Carey Lowell) with a baby hire a nanny (Jenny Seagrove), a druid witch who sacrifices babies to a tree.","large":"Optimistic about their future, well-off parents Kate (Carey Lowell) and Phil (Dwier Brown) hire the pleasant and lovely young Camilla (Jenny Seagrove) to live with them and care for their new baby. Though Camilla seems like an answer to their prayers, she proves to be more than she appears, and a diabolical plot involving the wellbeing of their child is uncovered. The young parents are forced to fight supernatural forces for the life of their vulnerable offspring.

programme.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
programme.desc: A psychopathic hitchhiker (Jake Busey) terrorizes a man (C. Thomas Howell) and his girlfriend (Kari Wuhrer) as they take a road trip.","large":"Years after being traumatized by a hitchhiker, Jim Halsey (C. Thomas Howell) is trying to piece his life back together. After being suspended from the police force, he decides to return to Texas to speak with a friend about his problems. He reluctantly agrees to let his girlfriend, Maggie (Kari Wuhrer), join him. As they drive, Maggie lets a stranded driver (Jake Busey) into the car. Halsey becomes suspicious and kicks him out, but the stranger returns, undeterred, to wreak havoc.

programme.title: I Saw What You Did
programme.desc: Two teenage girls, bored while baby-sitting, make prank phone calls, completely unaware one of the people on the other end of the line has just killed his wife and now thinks the girls must be silenced.","large":"Kit (Sarah Lane) and her best friend, Libby (Andi Garrett), are two teenage girls bored while baby-sitting. To pass the time, they make prank phone calls, telling the person on the other end of the line, "I saw what you did, and I know who you are!" It's all in good fun, until they call a man (John Ireland) who just murdered his wife and buried her in the woods. Convinced they actually do know his secret, he becomes determined to find out who they are and silence them forever.

programme.title: Incarnate
programme.desc: Recruited by a Vatican emissary (Catalina Sandino Moreno), an exorcist (Aaron Eckhart) taps into the subconscious mind of a tormented boy (David Mazouz) to free him from demonic possession.","large":"After a single mother witnesses terrifying symptoms of demonic possession in her 11-year-old son (David Mazouz), a Vatican representative calls on wheelchair-bound scientist Dr. Seth Ember (Aaron Eckhart) to rid him of the evil spirit. Driven by a personal agenda rooted in his own tragic past, Ember enters the boy's unconscious mind where he confronts a demon as ferocious as it is ingenious.

programme.title: Karma
programme.desc: When recent college grad Manny has trouble making ends meet, his father-in-law offers him a job evicting delinquent tenants. Manny soon finds himself unleashing a karma demon which stalks him at every turn.

programme.title: The Keeping Hours
programme.desc: A lawyer sees the ghost of his dead son, which leads the man's estranged wife back into his life.

programme.title: Killer High
programme.desc: Sabrina's perfectly planned high school reunion goes south when a monster keeps killing all the guests.

programme.title: Boogeyman
programme.desc: Mike (Eddie McClintock), the town sheriff, has to battle the mythical Boogeyman after boys accidentally release it.

programme.title: Long Time Dead
programme.desc: A genie terrorizes London students (Lara Belmont, Melanie Gutteridge) after they unwittingly summon it with a Ouija.","large":"After a long night of dancing and drinking their way into a haze, roommates Rob (Joe Absolom), Liam (Alec Newman), Stella (Lara Belmont) and Spencer (James Hillier) and a few of their friends duck into a back room of the nightclub to play around with a Ouija board. None of the friends like what the board tells them: they will all die that night. Sure enough, one by one the young friends are slaughtered by a malevolent killer, amid revelations about satanic worship and sacrifice.

programme.title: The New Daughter
programme.desc: A single father (Kevin Costner) is puzzled by his daughter's (Ivana Baquero) weird behavior, which begins soon after he moves his family to a secluded woodland home.

programme.title: Nightmare
programme.desc: A guardian (David Knight) and his lover (Moira Redmond) stage grim scenes to drive a haunted English heiress (Jennie Linden) mad.

programme.title: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: An office worker becomes trapped in a building with a killer.

programme.title: Phantasm II
programme.desc: Two psychically linked teens (James LeGros, Paula Irvine) cannot escape from the grave-robbing Tall Man of their nightmares.","large":"Years after surviving his encounter with the sinister Tall Man (Angus Scrimm), Mike Pearson (James LeGros), now a mental patient, still has nightmares about the evil gaunt mortician. Upon being released from the institution, Mike and his friend Reggie (Reggie Bannister) set out to track down the Tall Man and end his murderous and macabre practices. Also involved is Liz Reynolds (Paula Irvine), a pretty young woman who has a psychic connection to both Mike and the Tall Man.

programme.title: Psycho IV: The Beginning
programme.desc: Norman Bates (Anthony Perkins) phones a talk show and recalls his life as a 1940s teenager (Henry Thomas) warped by his mother (Olivia Hussey).","large":"Released from a mental institution once again, Norman Bates (Anthony Perkins) calls in to tell his life story to a radio host (CCH Pounder). Norman recalls his days as a young boy living with his schizophrenic mother (Olivia Hussey), and the jealous rage that inspired her murder. In the present, Norman lives with his pregnant wife, Connie (Donna Mitchell), fearing that his child will inherit his split personality disorder, and "Mother" will return to kill again.

programme.title: Rosewood Lane
programme.desc: Sonny Blake (Rose McGowan), a radio talk show therapist, moves back to her childhood home after her father dies. She is shocked to learn her neighbors are terrified of the paperboy (Daniel Ross Owens) who turns out to be a dangerous sociopath.

programme.title: Saint Ange
programme.desc: Strange events haunt a pregnant woman (Virginie Ledoyen) and others at a recently vacated orphanage in the French Alps.","large":"Anna is a cleaning woman who accepts a post at the St. Ange Orphanage. She arrives to confront an unsettling lack of orphans, save for one who acts far too childish for her age. Then the bizarre sights and sounds begin, which seem to elude detection by the only other servant or the gloomy institution's director. Is this all in Anna's mind? Or does something more sinister lurk in the heart of St. Ange?

programme.title: Session 9
programme.desc: Asbestos removal crews start work in an abandoned insane asylum, and strange happenings begin to occur.","large":"A tale of terror when a group of asbestos removal workers start work in an abandoned insane asylum. The complex of buildings looms up out of the woods like a dormant beast. Grand, imposing ... abandoned, deteriorating. The residents of Danvers, Massachusetts steer well clear of the place. But Danvers State Mental Hospital, closed down for 15 years, is about to receive five new visitors...

programme.title: SiREN
programme.desc: A man visits a supernatural nightclub during his bachelor party and inadvertently crosses paths with a dancer who is actually a terrifying, legendary creature.","large":"One week before his wedding day, Jonah and his groomsmen hit the town for a wild night of club hopping and debauchery. The night soon takes a twisted turn for the worse when the group is invited to a seedy underground club. After Jonah frees a seemingly imprisoned dancer, he realizes that the woman he released is actually a terrifying, legendary creature that will stop at nothing to claim her prey.

programme.title: The Skulls
programme.desc: A freshman (Joshua Jackson) joins an elite society that will guarantee him success, but he questions his decision when his reporter roommate dies mysteriously.","large":"For Luke McNamara (Joshua Jackson), an invitation to join the prestigious secret college organization, The Skulls, is a dream come true. But he soon comes to realize just how powerful The Skulls organization really is -- and that the truth, like success, comes at a very high price.

programme.title: The Skulls II
programme.desc: A new inductee (Robin Dunne) into the secret society witnesses a murder at the hands of one of its members.","large":"The Skulls, a secret college society whose influence reaches the highest levels of government and business, recruit Ryan Sommers (Robin Dunne), whose future success now seems all but assured. Then one day he sees one of his fraternity brothers kill a young woman -- a crime that Ryan must keep secret if he is to remain a Skull. While Kelly (Lindy Booth), a good friend, pushes him to follow his conscience, Ryan's girlfriend, Ali (Ashley Lyn Cafagna), surprises him by being against his snitching.

programme.title: The Skulls III
programme.desc: A young woman (Clare Kramer) gets more than she bargained for when she gains entrance to a males-only secret society.","large":"In this sequel, beautiful and determined college student Taylor Brooks (Clare Kramer) is intent on joining the secret society known as the Skulls, despite its history of being an organization consisting solely of men. Although she encounters strong resistance, Taylor takes steps toward being accepted into their ranks, but her efforts are derailed when her boyfriend is found dead. Taylor is considered the prime suspect. Can she clear her name and track down the real murderer?

programme.title: The Spider Woman Strikes Back
programme.desc: She (Gale Sondergaard) and her hulking servant grow bloodsucking plants, as a young woman (Brenda Joyce) finds out.

programme.title: Stephanie
programme.desc: After a mysterious global catastrophe, a young girl is left alone to hide from a malevolent power that stalks her home.","large":"A young girl is left alone in her house during a worldwide catastrophe and fearfully hides from a malevolent force that is stalking her. When her parents miraculously return, they try to settle back into normal life, but become increasingly concerned about something that has affected their daughter Stephanie.

programme.title: Virus
programme.desc: Passengers (Jamie Lee Curtis, William Baldwin, Donald Sutherland) on a sinking ship board a seemingly deserted Russian vessel containing a mutating alien force.","large":"Caught in a typhoon, a tugboat commanded by Robert Everton (Donald Sutherland) comes across a mysterious near-deserted ship. Excited to find a vessel that could be sold for as much as $30 million, Everton and his crew board and prepare to move the craft, despite the warnings of sole survivor Nadia Vinogradova (Joanna Pacula). When a malevolent alien presence begins killing off the crew, navigator Kit Foster (Jamie Lee Curtis) tries to convince the rest of them to leave before it's too late.

programme.title: Visions
programme.desc: After moving to a vineyard with her family, a pregnant woman experiences horrifying visions.

programme.title: Wer
programme.desc: In France, an American female attorney (A.J. Cook) defends a murder suspect who has a brutish appearance and a deadly secret.

programme.title: White Noise 2: The Light
programme.desc: After nearly being killed along with his family, a man recovers and realizes that he can sense when someone is about to die.","large":"A man's family is killed, but he survives -- barely. After recovering, he realizes that he has changed in some way: He now senses when someone is about to die. In his attempts to save people who are near death, he discovers there is a price to pay for interfering with the cosmos.

programme.title: The Wilding
programme.desc: A family tries to start over following a daughter's release from a mental health institution.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet Dr. Jekyll & Mr. Hyde
programme.desc: Policemen Slim (Bud Abbott) and Tubby (Lou Costello) go to London and meet a doctor (Boris Karloff) and his evil alter ego.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet Frankenstein
programme.desc: Dracula (Bela Lugosi) wants to put porter's (Lou Costello) brain in monster's body.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Invisible Man
programme.desc: Two detective-school graduates (Bud Abbott, Lou Costello) help a framed boxer who can make himself disappear.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Killer, Boris Karloff
programme.desc: A hotel detective (Bud Abbott) and bellhop (Lou Costello) find dead bodies and a fake swami (Boris Karloff).

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Mummy
programme.desc: Two guys stuck in Egypt follow a medallion to the crypt of Kharis.

programme.title: The Andromeda Strain
programme.desc: Scientists (Arthur Hill, David Wayne, James Olson) rush to isolate an alien germ brought back by a space probe.","large":"Chilling tale about a US research satellite carrying a deadly extraterrestrial microscopic organism that crashes into a small town in Arizona. A group of top scientists are hurriedly assembled in a bid to identify and contain the lethal stowaway. Based on the novel by Michael Crichton.

programme.title: The Black Cat
programme.desc: Stranded Budapest honeymooners follow a mad doctor (Bela Lugosi) to a black-lipped architect's (Boris Karloff) Art Deco manor.

programme.title: The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
programme.desc: A boy (Scott Sealey) upset by his parents' divorce must also tell the sheriff his father (Kerwin Mathews) is a werewolf.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein (Colin Clive) creates a hissing, frizzy-haired female (Elsa Lanchester) for his other monster (Boris Karloff).","large":"After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: The Brides of Dracula
programme.desc: Van Helsing (Peter Cushing) drives a stake through the heart of a vampire baron (David Peel) who even bites his own mother (Martita Hunt).

programme.title: Furious 7
programme.desc: A smooth-talking government agent offers to help Dominic Toretto and his gang eliminate a dangerous enemy in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker.","large":"After defeating international terrorist Owen Shaw, Dominic Toretto (Vin Diesel), Brian O'Conner (Paul Walker) and the rest of the crew have separated to return to more normal lives. However, Deckard Shaw , Owen's older brother, is thirsty for revenge. A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: Imprisoned for a murder he did not commit, a three-time speedway champion (Jason Statham) must compete in a brutal auto race in which the penalty for losing is death.","large":"Framed for a murder he did not commit, three-time speedway champ Jensen Ames (Jason Statham) finds himself at Terminal Island, the country's toughest prison, but he gets an unexpected chance at freedom when the warden offers a choice: Compete in the Death Race as a mythical driver called Frankenstein, or rot in a cell forever. Riding in a car equipped with flamethrowers and grenade launchers, Ames must survive a gauntlet of vicious criminals to win his freedom -- or die trying.

programme.title: Death Race 2
programme.desc: Convicted of killing a cop, an inmate (Luke Goss) competes in a brutal race where cars are deadly weapons.

programme.title: Death Race 3: Inferno
programme.desc: Only one victory away from winning his freedom, legendary driver Carl Lucas (Luke Goss) enters the first Death Race to take place in the brutal Kalahari Desert.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law of Return
programme.desc: An accomplished fighter pilot for the Israel Defense Forces and son of a U.S. senator is shot down while flying through Syrian airspace.

programme.title: Jarhead 2: Field of Fire
programme.desc: Without tanks or air support, a corporal and his team must muster all the courage and firepower they can to fight their way across war-torn Afghanistan and shepherd an important anti-Taliban woman to safety.

programme.title: Jarhead 3: The Siege
programme.desc: Marines protecting a U.S. embassy are caught off guard when militants suddenly attack. Outnumbered and outgunned, the Marines have to muster enough courage and firepower to survive the assault.

programme.title: Lone Survivor
programme.desc: In the mountains of Afghanistan, a squad of Taliban fighters ambushes four Navy SEALs, who are there on a mission to eliminate a high-ranking al-Qaeda operative.","large":"In 2005 Afghanistan, Navy SEALs Marcus Luttrell (Mark Wahlberg), Michael Murphy (Taylor Kitsch), Danny Dietz (Emile Hirsch) and Matthew "Axe" Axelson (Ben Foster) deploy on a mission of surveillance and to take out Taliban leader Ahmad Shah. Though spotted by goatherds, Luttrell and his team decide not to kill them. But one of the Afghans alerts a group of Taliban fighters to the invaders, and a terrible battle ensues, in which the SEALs find themselves hopelessly outnumbered and outgunned.

programme.title: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Brandon's world is turned upside down when he receives a phone call from Maurice, revealing himself to be his long-lost brother.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law of Return
programme.desc: An accomplished fighter pilot for the Israel Defense Forces and son of a U.S. senator is shot down while flying through Syrian airspace.

programme.title: Jarhead 3: The Siege
programme.desc: Marines protecting a U.S. embassy are caught off guard when militants suddenly attack. Outnumbered and outgunned, the Marines have to muster enough courage and firepower to survive the assault.

But one of the Afghans alerts a group of Taliban fighters to the invaders, and a terrible battle ensues, in which the SEALs find themselves hopelessly outnumbered and outgunned.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: A jailed IRA operative (Richard Gere) helps the FBI track a masterful assassin (Bruce Willis) about to perform a political killing.","large":"During an FBI raid on a Moscow nightclub, the brother of Russian gangster Terek Murad (David Hayman) is killed. Murad wants revenge and hires anonymous hit man the Jackal (Bruce Willis) to kill FBI Deputy Director Carter Preston (Sidney Poitier). With the help of Russian agent Valentina Koslova (Diane Venora), Preston finds the only man who knows what the notorious Jackal looks like, imprisoned IRA terrorist Declan Mulqueen (Richard Gere), and forces him to help hunt down the hit man.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Hired to find a missing person in New Orleans, a merchant seaman (Jean-Claude Van Damme) becomes the prey of those (Lance Henriksen, Arnold Vosloo) who hunt men for sport.","large":"Chance Boudreaux (Jean-Claude Van Damme), a sailor skilled in martial arts, is employed to guard Natasha Binder (Yancy Butler) as she tracks down her father, an itinerant Vietnam veteran living in New Orleans named Douglas (Chuck Pfarrer). They soon uncover a sinister group of wealthy men who hunt the homeless for sport, paying them $10,000 if they can survive a crosstown journey. When Chance discovers that Natasha's father was one of their victims, he decides to destroy the evil hunters.

programme.title: Hard Target 2
programme.desc: A retired mixed martial artist (Scott Adkins) is offered one final bout, but he learns he has been tricked into becoming the target of a human hunt when he arrives for the fight.

programme.title: Carlito's Way: Rise to Power
programme.desc: A New York gangster (Jay Hernandez) forms an alliance with two criminals to become the most powerful drug kingpin in Spanish Harlem.","large":"After serving time together in prison, three gangsters from different backgrounds -- Carlito (Jay Hernandez), Earl (Mario Van Peebles) and Rocco (Michael Kelly) -- join forces and take over the lucrative heroin trade in Harlem, N.Y. However, their partnership with a gangster (Burt Young) is threatened when Earl's hotheaded little brother, Reggie (Mtume Gant), disrespects the mobster's son and then kidnaps him. A ransom goes out on Reggie's head, and the friends are forced to choose sides.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A mobster's (James Caan) goons pursue a fugitive underling (Adam Sandler) turning state's evidence to an undercover policeman (Damon Wayans) he once shot.","large":"A none-too-bright criminal, Archie Moses (Adam Sandler) works for drug kingpin Frank Colton (James Caan) and remains oblivious to the fact that one of his closest buddies is actually an undercover police officer named Jack Carter (Damon Wayans). After Moses accidentally shoots Carter, the cop must recover and then bring the two-bit thug in to take the stand against Colton. With Carter and Moses on far from good terms, however, the trip does not go well.

programme.title: Assault on Precinct 13
programme.desc: A cop must arm prisoners to help fend off an attack by gunmen who want to kill a gangster locked away in the crumbling station.","large":"While en route to prison, a bus carrying criminals Marion (Laurence Fishburne), Beck (John Leguizamo) and Anna (Aisha Hinds) is rerouted to Detroit's soon-to-be-closed Precinct 13 because of a dangerous winter storm. All communications with the outside world are cut off, and Jake (Ethan Hawke), an emotionally volatile police sergeant who is haunted by his past, is forced to work with the criminals in order to survive an attack on the precinct by a group of armed men.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: A jailed IRA operative (Richard Gere) helps the FBI track a masterful assassin (Bruce Willis) about to perform a political killing.","large":"During an FBI raid on a Moscow nightclub, the brother of Russian gangster Terek Murad (David Hayman) is killed. programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: The actions of Jason Bourne spell the possible end of secret intelligence programs, so a specially enhanced operative (Jeremy Renner) goes on the run with a research scientist (Rachel Weisz) when it appears that their lives will become forfeit.","large":"When the actions of Jason Bourne spark a fire that threatens to burn down decades of research across a number of secret intelligence agencies, Eric Byer (Edward Norton), the man who built the programs, decides he must sacrifice one of them: Outcome. Aaron Cross (Jeremy Renner), one of Outcome's six agents, and research scientist Marta Shearing (Rachel Weisz) go on the run when Byer targets them for termination. But Cross proves to be a far deadlier target than Byer realizes.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: A band of samurai sets out to avenge the death and dishonor of their master at the hands of a ruthless shogun.

programme.title: Blade of the 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Ancient Japanese Ronin warriors, set 300 years after 47 Ronin, in a modern-day world where Samurai clans exist in complete secrecy.

programme.title: Riddick
programme.desc: Left for dead on a sun-scorched planet, wanted criminal Riddick must confront two teams of mercenaries, one of whom is led by a man from his past.","large":"Left for dead on a sun-scorched planet, fugitive Riddick fights for survival against alien predators more lethal than any human he has yet encountered. His only hope for escape is to activate an emergency beacon, but that brings with it a different problem: mercenaries. The first ship carries an especially violent and lethal group; the second is led by a man from Riddick's past. With time running out, Riddick realizes that neither group will leave without his head as a trophy.

programme.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
programme.desc: Sent by an evil queen (Charlize Theron) to capture an escaped princess (Kristen Stewart), a huntsman (Chris Hemsworth) instead becomes the young woman's protector and helps her in her quest to regain control of her kingdom.","large":"Queen Ravenna (Charlize Theron), who seized control of her kingdom by marrying and killing its rightful ruler, needs the life force of young maidens to maintain her beauty. However, to become truly immortal, Ravenna must consume the heart of her stepdaughter Snow White (Kristen Stewart). Snow escapes, and Ravenna dispatches a huntsman (Chris Hemsworth) to capture her. But Snow, the Huntsman and a rebel army join forces to destroy Ravenna and restore the balance of life and death.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: A huntsman (Chris Hemsworth) and a fellow warrior (Jessica Chastain) battle an ice queen (Emily Blunt) and her evil, resurrected sister (Charlize Theron).","large":"Betrayed by her evil sister Ravenna (Charlize Theron), heartbroken Freya (Emily Blunt) retreats to a northern kingdom to raise an army of huntsmen as her protectors. Gifted with the ability to freeze her enemies in ice, Freya teaches her young soldiers to never fall in love. When Eric (Chris Hemsworth) and fellow warrior Sara defy this rule, the angry queen does whatever she can to stop them. As war between the siblings escalates, Eric and Sara try to end Ravenna's wicked reign.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A former gold miner heads back west to start a new life with his wife.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A sheriff mistakes an orphaned black boy as a slave and tries to free him.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A very ill, pregnant widow travels west with her seven children.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Ellen is convinced that a mysterious man is responsible for her fiancé's death on an earlier expedition.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Five years after committing murder, Frank Buckley is paroled to Slim Sherman, but there are some in town who don't want the killer in their midst.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess hunt for Vernon Kane, who has robbed the bank and killed a popular deputy, but their search also leads them to a gambler and his wife, who've joined forces with the outlaw.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess join a posse hunting for three escaped gang members who attempted to rob the Wells Fargo office, killing a deputy sheriff.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess become involved in a fight between the ranchers and the homesteaders, and despite their efforts at keeping the situation under control, a rancher is murdered.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Hoping to find a better price for their cattle, Slim and Jess wind up in Nebraska, where the death of the marshal leads the two to take his place for a month.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Outlaws try to prevent three saloon dancers from testifying at a murder trial.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: An outlaw-turned-stool pigeon is marked for murder by his old gang.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie pursues a diamond necklace thief.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A former Mexican governor seeks refuge.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A choice between love and career.

programme.desc: Three soldiers held for murder are victims of their commander's unprovoked attack on Indians.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A writer gets involved with an outlaw.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A band of men tries to rob the train.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: After suffering an injury, Flint is held hostage by a bitter woman who plans on surrendering him to nearby Shoshone.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A vengeful lawman claims that a town's hero is really a thief and needs to be taken back to Boston to stand trial.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Vivian leaves the train to get married.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint McCullough is led into a trap by a young Indian woman whose tribe attempts to exchange him for rifles from the wagon train.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Three nuns hope to start a mission school for Native Americans.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Members of the wagon train mutiny when Adams (Ward Bond) suggests assisting a group afflicted with cholera. With Robert Horton.

programme.desc: A woman searches for her missing fiancé.

programme.desc: Flint is ordered to bring an escaped convict (LeMay) to the law.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A man threatens to kill his wife if she doesn't give him money.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess, on the run after killing a marshal, is offered a place in Owen Cantrell's private army fighting in a border dispute between the U.S. and Canada.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim encounters a loudmouthed bully with a wagon train on the outskirts of town, and when the bully is killed, Slim is kidnapped to face charges of murder per the wagon train rules.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess and the marshal hunt a band of outlaws, but after gunfire is exchanged, the gang leader suggests a prisoner exchange -- he'll give back the local man he's taken in exchange for Jess and the marshal.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Jess goes to help an old prospector friend, he crosses Matt Jessup and his gang, who have the townsfolk too scared to talk.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A professor from the East asks Slim to guide him to his friend's gold strike from a decade earlier, but there is more to the professor than meets the eye.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A woman looks to Slim for help when a gang of outlaws plans to kill her marshal husband as revenge for a robbery he averted.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Stagecoach passengers are held captive at a Wells Fargo station.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.desc: A school teacher wins over the town before his past is revealed.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Maxon and Hardie try to prevent a boy from becoming an outlaw.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie and his prisoner fight off gunmen out to kill them both.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint and his passengers seek shelter in a cave when snow blocks a mountain pass.

programme.desc: Woman wants husbands for her daughters.

programme.desc: Adams, Hawks, and Wooster learn that Flint is driving a stagecoach they plan to take from San Francisco to St. Louis.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Greenhorns board Adams' wagon train for a journey to California. Guest: Mickey Rooney.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A reporter organizes a suffragette movement among the married women on the train.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When a young Basque is murdered, his father (Ernest Borgnine) searches for the killer to avenge his death.

programme.title: Wagon Train

programme.title: RRR

programme.title: I
programme.desc: Starring: Vikram,Amy Jackson. Lingesan, a thriving model, finds love with Diya, but his life unravels when he's plagued by physical deformities, testing their love.

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonali Bendre. A joint Indian family faces trials as Ramkishen and Mamta raise their children. Mamta's ambition drives a division, but her sons oppose her, leading to family conflict and revelations.

programme.title: Mr Celebrity
programme.desc: Starring: Varalaxmi Sarathkumar,Paruchuri Sudarshan. Lalita, a fearless activist, claims dream rape with marks as proof. A masked figure traps her, a YouTuber, and a cop in a suspenseful thriller.

programme.title: Gunjan Saxena: The Kargil Girl
programme.desc: Starring: Janhvi Kapoor,Pankaj Tripathi. Gunjan Saxena, inspired by the allure of cockpit life, overcomes hurdles to fulfill her dream of becoming a pilot, bravely serving her country in the Kargil War.

programme.title: Bhajarangi 2
programme.desc: Starring: Shiva Rajkumar,Shruthi Raj. A forest officer uncovers drug baron Araka's scheme: exploiting villagers for drug production. Driven, the officer resolves to halt the operation.

programme.title: Chandu Champion
programme.desc: Starring: Kartik Aaryan,Vijay Raaz. Chandu Champion faced every obstacle with grit and fire. From tough times to triumph, his unbreakable spirit led him to India's first individual Olympic gold. One man. One dream. One victory.

Starring: Rajinikanth,Akshay Kumar. In Chennai, mobiles begin flying out of people's hands. Dr. Vaseegaran reactivates his robot, Chitti, to battle the bird-like supernatural force of Pakshirajan, who controls the skies.

programme.title: Aranmanai 4
programme.desc: Starring: Sundar C,Tamannaah Bhatia. Daniel's quest to uncover his sister's death spirals into a nightmare, revealing sinister truths and igniting a chain of terror that changes him forever.

programme.title: Ek Rishtaa: The Bond of Love
programme.desc: Starring: Amitabh Bachchan,Akshay Kumar. Ajay's bond with his father is strained. But when danger threatens his family, he takes charge to stop his brother-in-law's harmful intentions and save them.

programme.title: Radhe
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Disha Patani. After taking the dreaded gangster Gani Bhai, ACP Rajveer Shikawat aka Radhe goes on a manhunt to find the wealthiest man of the town secretly running a crime syndicate.

programme.title: Hum Aapke Hain Koun
programme.desc: Starring: Madhuri Dixit,Salman Khan. Prem madly loves Nisha, his brother Rajesh's sister-in-law. But when Rajesh's wife dies, the families urge him to marry Nisha for the sake of his baby. Prem and Nisha decide to sacrifice their love.

programme.title: Bruce Lee - The Fighter
programme.desc: Starring: Ram Charan,Kriti Kharbanda. Kartik sacrifices his studies for his sister and becomes a stunt man. Often mistaken for an undercover policeman, Kartik helps unearth the evil designs of businessmen Deepak Raj and Jayaraj.

programme.title: Dhadak
programme.desc: Starring: Ishaan Khatter,Janhvi Kapoor. Madhu and Parthavi elope to escape their families' disapproval. But their love is tested when Parthavi's father and brother refuse to let them go easily.

programme.title: Shivam Bhaje
programme.desc: Starring: Ashwin Babu,Digangana Suryavanshi. A loan agent sees crime visions after an accident. He uncovers a plot to harm India and a serial killer. He must solve the mystery and stop the disaster.

programme.title: Mili
programme.desc: Starring: Janhvi Kapoor,Sunny Kaushal. Mili gets trapped in a freezer, turning a regular day into a desperate fight for survival where minutes mean life or death in the freezing cold.

programme.title: A Flying Jatt
programme.desc: Starring: Tiger Shroff,Jacqueline Fernandez. Aman, a martial arts teacher, discovers his superpowers during a fight with Raka. After Raka gains strength from toxic waste, Aman must defeat him.

programme.title: RRR
programme.desc: Starring: N. T. Rama Rao Jr.,Ram Charan. A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.

programme.title: Bhaje Vaayu Vegam
programme.desc: Starring: Tanikella Bharani,Krishna Chaitanya. A budding cricketer bets big to fund his father's surgery but is betrayed by a bookie. Seeking revenge, he lands on a crime website, facing unexpected dangers that test his resolve.

programme.title: Tumbbad
programme.desc: Starring: Sohum Shah,Jyoti Malshe. A family worships Hastar for his gold, ignoring every warning. Their greed awakens something monstrous-and soon, they're fighting for survival against an ancient curse they brought on themselves.

programme.title: Jai Ho
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Tabu. Jai leaves the army to inspire apathetic citizens. His movement catches fire, but a clash with an influential political family threatens everything he's built.

programme.title: Butterfly
programme.desc: Starring: Anupama Parameswaran. Geetha battles to rescue her sister's kidnapped children. In her desperate mission, she unearths disturbing truths about her seemingly ordinary neighbours.

programme.title: Middle Class Love
programme.desc: Starring: Eisha Singh,Kavya Thapar. A young college boy, weary of his middle class life, sees love as his escape from it, hoping for a different and more fulfilling future.

programme.title: Saand Ki Aankh
programme.desc: Starring: Taapsee Pannu,Nikhat Khan. Chandro and Prakashi accidentally discover their shooting skills. With the help of an instructor, they participate in various competitions.

programme.title: Kakuda
programme.desc: Starring: Riteish Deshmukh,Sonakshi Sinha. Haunted by a village curse predicting her husband's death in thirteen days, a newlywed bride seeks a ghost hunter's help to save the man she loves desperately tonight.

programme.title: Kick
programme.desc: Starring: Ravi Teja,Ileana. Naina leaves wanderer Kalyan and agrees to wed a cop, only to discover he is after Kalyan, pulling her back into turmoil.

programme.title: Sikandar
programme.desc: Starring: Parzan Dastur,Ayesha Kapoor. Sikandar, a 14-year-old Kashmiri, finds a gun, setting off a series of events that entwine him in the complexities of militancy, politics, and tragedy.

programme.title: Padosan
programme.desc: Bhola Falls In Love With His Neighbour Bindu, A Fashionable College Girl. In Order To Woo Her, He Seeks Help From A Friend. But Bhola Loses All Hope When Bindu Claims To Love Someone Else.

programme.title: Kale Dhande Gore Log
programme.desc: Sudarshan Kumar, an honest customs officer, is murdered by smuggler Durga Das Jetia. Years later, his kids seek revenge on Michael, the man framed for their father's death.

programme.title: Haisiyat
programme.desc: Union leader Ram is also married to his boss. When there is a conflict between the management and the workers, Ram must decide if his duty lies towards his wife or towards his union and the workers.

programme.title: Kohraam
programme.desc: Kohraam is an intense action thriller that explores the life of a man who uncovers a dangerous conspiracy. As he faces threats and challenges, he must fight to expose the truth and save lives.

programme.title: Shagird
programme.desc: Professor Brij, who is sworn to bachelorhood, mentors Ramesh, who wants to be just like him. However, when the professor falls for Poonam, he faces a dilemma.

programme.title: Khushboo
programme.desc: Kusum and Brindavan love each other, and decide to marry when they grow up. But fate has other plans, both are separated. Years later they meet again.

programme.title: My Life My Story
programme.desc: RJ Anmol chats with Bollywood stars who share real stories, emotional memories, and funny moments from their lives. A candid and heartwarming glimpse into stardom.

programme.title: Kirayadar
programme.desc: Laxmi Abhyankar and her employed daughter Jaya live on rent in a flat on Pali Hill, Mumbai they rented years ago from Lucknow-based Kundanlal Choudhury. His son Anil comes to Mumbai and gets a job.

programme.title: Anjaana
programme.desc: Raju, Garage mechanic falls in love with a rich girl but her guardian opposes the marriage. Then Raju decides to con him to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Sanjog
programme.desc: Asha's life turns upside down when she realizes that her guardians are not her real parents and her real mother is mentally ill.

programme.title: Mehboob Ki Mehndi

programme.title: Ek Chalis Ki Last Local
programme.desc: Nilesh is a call centre executive who misses his last local train at 1:40 am. He meets Madhu, who also misses the train. Since there is an auto strike, they decide to take a walk. The duo then attend a bar that changes their life upside down.

programme.title: Ek Ajnabee
programme.desc: A supernatural thriller that tells the story of a magician haunted by a childhood memory of encountering a witch. When he falls in love with a woman who resembles the witch, he must confront his fears and uncover the truth about her identity. The film explores themes of superstition, fear, and the power of the mind in a spine-tingling and suspenseful plot.

programme.title: The Legend Of Bhagat Singh
programme.desc: During the British Raj, upon witnessing the atrocities of the British, Bhagat Singh grows up to be a fierce freedom fighter. His publicised ideas of revolution bring him to as much popularity as Mahatma Gandhi amongst Indians.
